title: SpEx E2W1 Panoramas
description: SpEx E2W1 Panorama Resource Pack - Multiple custom panoramas for Vistas mod
body:
Custom panoramas made by and for the Vistas mod.

This resourcepack specifically is made of panoramas from the World 1 of the Event 2 of the CivLabs' Specialization Experiment.

It includes places like the Spawn, Sunfish, Dwarf Republic, Aquadillo and much more!
